title: Baxter India International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Baxter India International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Baxter India International Enterprises in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Baxter India International Enterprises:
Baxter India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India International Enterprises!
